lines.text: [deliberate] From tonight, everything changes how it moves. Nothing electronic. No phone, no email, none of that cloud stuff either. [pause] If it's got a battery you didn't build yourself, it doesn't touch this.
Then how do two hundred guys across four states coordinate a—
[flatly] Handwritten letters. The ham net, on its schedule, in code. And a book cipher.
That's insane. [pause] That's — that's Revolutionary War stuff.
[flatly] They've got every algorithm ever written. We've got Valley Forge.
Cover for July. Where's each of you, anybody in the county asks.
